description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a dark, multi-faceted hip roof and a prominent central section flanked by a single-story garage wing. The house is surrounded by a low beige boundary wall enclosing a landscaped yard with grass, shrubs, and several mature trees. The front facade features a covered entryway with a small porch, steps, and a dark door, while the rear includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and direct access to the garden. Windows are symmetrically arranged, with white frames and a mix of single and double panes, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. The garage is attached to the left side of the house and has a white door, while the driveway and walkways are paved with gray stone. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern suburban home with traditional influences, offering both functionality and curb appeal.
description: A two-story brick house with a dark hip roof, attached garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. Symmetrical windows, a covered entryway, and a rear patio with outdoor furniture complete its suburban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, steps, attached garage on the left, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the plain brick wall, garage extension, and side garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area with outdoor furniture, large windows, and access to the backyard garden.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the driveway, side entrance, and additional garden space with trees and shrubs.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, dark main door, small overhang, and minimal decorative elements
